PART_B.note: Staggered mode is in the NULL SPACE of H at Q=I for L=4

PART_C_note: Power iteration slow convergence for random Q (many nearly-degenerate eigenvalues)
PART_F_trend: Monotonically decreasing from eps=0.01 (0.0833) to eps=2.0 (negative)
note_convergence: Power iteration did not converge for most configs (res > 1e-4). True max eigenvalue may be slightly different but overall trend is clear.
